email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de stage Marketing, Innovation & Communication bij SPA, Bru, Zyla, Wattwiller & Carola. Uw oproep voor een nieuwsgierige, proactieve stagiair die graag leert door te doen, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik concurrentieanalyses uit, optimaliseer ik content en werk ik met data uit tools zoals SEMrush en Google Analytics. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data en technische SEO-audits. Deze vaardigheden kan ik direct inzetten voor de concurrentie- en consumenteninzichten die u zoekt.

Ik spreek Engels (vloeiend), Turks (moedertaal) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding). Mijn eerste stage-ervaring in een FMCG-achtige omgeving (Episto) en mijn gestructureerde, detailgerichte aanpak maken mij een sterke kandidaat.

Ik kijk ernaar uit mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Marketing, Innovation & Communication Internship at SPA, Bru, Zyla, Wattwiller & Carola. Your call for a curious, proactive intern who learns by doing matches my profile perfectly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I conduct competitive analyses, optimize content, and work with data from tools like SEMrush and Google Analytics. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data and technical SEO audits. These skills can be directly applied to the competition reviews and consumer insights you are looking for.

I speak English (fluent), Turkish (native), and Dutch (B1, currently studying). My first internship experience in an FMCG-like environment (Episto) and my structured, detail-oriented approach make me a strong candidate.

I look forward to discussing my motivation further in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Marketing, Innovation & Communication bij SPA, Bru, Zyla, Wattwiller & Carola. Uw oproep voor een nieuwsgierige, proactieve stagiair die graag leert door te doen, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto (2026-heden) voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik websites in WordPress. Ik werk dagelijks met concurrentieanalyses via SEMrush en Ahrefs, en rapporteer prestaties via Google Analytics en Search Console. Deze ervaring sluit direct aan bij de gevraagde concurrentie- en consumenteninzichten.

Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com (2025-heden) gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) en technische SEO/GEO-audits toegepast om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Dit toont mijn analytische en gestructureerde aanpak, die ik graag inzet voor productproeverijen, concept screeners en merkactivatie.

U zoekt iemand die zowel creatieve als analytische taken aankan. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling (AngularJS, JavaScript) en mijn ervaring met contentbeheer en sociale media maken mij flexibel inzetbaar. Ik spreek Engels (vloeiend), Turks (moedertaal) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding). Mijn eerste stage-ervaring bij Episto en mijn gestructureerde, detailgerichte werkwijze maken mij een sterke kandidaat voor deze functie.

Ik ben beschikbaar voor minimaal 6 maanden, startend tussen september 2026 en januari 2027, en woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen. Ik kijk ernaar uit mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Marketing, Innovation & Communication Internship at SPA, Bru, Zyla, Wattwiller & Carola. Your call for a curious, proactive intern who learns by doing matches my profile and ambition perfectly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto (2026-present), I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage websites in WordPress. I work daily with competitive analyses using SEMrush and Ahrefs, and report performance via Google Analytics and Search Console. This experience directly aligns with the competition reviews and consumer insights you are looking for.

Additionally, on my own project mirook.com (2025-present), I have applied structured data (JSON-LD schema) and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This demonstrates my analytical and structured approach, which I am eager to apply to product tastings, concept screeners, and brand activation.

You are looking for someone who can handle both creative and analytical tasks. My technical background in web development (AngularJS, JavaScript) and my experience with content management and social media make me flexible. I speak English (fluent), Turkish (native), and Dutch (B1, currently studying). My first internship experience at Episto and my structured, detail-oriented work style make me a strong candidate for this role.

I am available for a minimum of 6 months, starting between September 2026 and January 2027, and I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. I look forward to discussing my motivation further in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on experience with competitive analysis and performance reporting using SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console at Episto.
- Built and managed WordPress sites (Elementor, Astra) with structured data and technical SEO audits for mirook.com.
- Skilled in content creation, keyword research, and asset adaptation for brand consistency.
- Bilingual English (fluent) and Dutch (B1, actively improving); trilingual with Turkish.
- First internship experience in a fast-paced digital marketing environment (Episto), with a structured and detail-oriented approach.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in competitive analysis, consumer insights, and content optimization. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
